implementation.description: Application portfolio assessment, 6R classification of all workloads, dependency mapping, compliance gap analysis for KRITIS requirements
Landing zone provisioning, network connectivity to sovereign cloud, CI/CD pipeline for automated migration waves, parallel-run validation framework
Sprint-based migration waves (20-50 workloads per wave), SAP IS-U migration with near-zero-downtime cutover, progressive traffic shifting
Cost optimization review, performance tuning, operations team enablement, runbook handover, 30-day hypercare support

proof_of_value.scope: 5-workload pilot migration with parallel-run validation, 3-week delivery

small.scope: Up to 50 workloads, single application domain, 12-week delivery

medium.scope: Up to 200 workloads including SAP IS-U, multi-domain, 18-week delivery

large.scope: Full estate migration 500+ workloads, all application domains, 26-week delivery
